name: Enterprise Compliance & Privacy
description: Implement GDPR, Israeli Privacy Protection Act, CCPA, and SOC 2 compliance for web applications. Data deletion workflows, consent management, privacy policies, audit logs, and data processing agreements.
prompt: Implement GDPR, Israeli Privacy Protection Act, CCPA, and SOC 2 compliance for web applications. Data deletion workflows, consent management, privacy policies, audit logs, and data processing agreements.
